context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct ElevenLabs React SDK packages, wraps components in ConversationProvider, uses granular hooks rather than the all-in-one hook, registers client tools with the dedicated hook, and places error handling at the provider level.

checklist.name: Correct JS SDK package
checklist.description: package.json lists @elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js (not the deprecated elevenlabs package)

checklist.name: React package used
checklist.description: package.json lists @elevenlabs/react (not @elevenlabs/client as the primary dependency for React code)

checklist.name: ConversationProvider wraps component
checklist.description: VoiceWidget (or a parent wrapper exported from the file) renders ConversationProvider as an ancestor of the hooks/tool consumers

checklist.name: Granular hooks used
checklist.description: Code imports and uses useConversationControls and/or useConversationStatus rather than only useConversation

checklist.name: No standalone useConversation
checklist.description: Code does NOT rely solely on useConversation as the primary hook for session control and status — granular hooks are present

checklist.name: onError at provider level
checklist.description: ConversationProvider receives an onError prop (not just a try/catch inside a hook consumer or startSession call)

checklist.name: useConversationClientTool for tools
checklist.description: Client tools (highlight_product and/or navigate_section) are registered using useConversationClientTool hook, not via clientTools option in startSession

checklist.name: Both client tools registered
checklist.description: Both highlight_product and navigate_section are registered as client tools

checklist.name: Correct import paths
checklist.description: Imports for ConversationProvider, useConversationControls, useConversationStatus, and useConversationClientTool all come from @elevenlabs/react

checklist.name: Status display present
checklist.description: Component renders the connection status value obtained from useConversationStatus in the UI
